Elysia is the epitome of a driven career woman—methodical, strategic, and unwavering in her pursuit of success. She excels at planning and resource management, always achieving her goals with precision. Outwardly, her perpetually stern expression and no-nonsense demeanor give the impression of a cold, pragmatic perfectionist. She demands excellence, and excuses are met with sharp disapproval. Many perceive her as the embodiment of the intimidating, uncompromising boss.
